scripts.start:full: ui5 build --all --clean-dest && sed -i '' 's|src="resources/sap-ui-core.js"|src="https://ui5.sap.com/1.120.0/resources/sap-ui-core.js"|g' dist/index.html && npx --yes serve dist -l 8080
scripts.deploy: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-ghpages.js && npx gh-pages -d dist
scripts.deploy:zip: npm run build && sed -i '' 's|src="resources/sap-ui-core.js"|src="https://ui5.sap.com/1.120.0/resources/sap-ui-core.js"|g' dist/index.html && echo pushstate: enabled > dist/Staticfile && rm -f ui5-vizframe-app.zip && cd dist && find . -path ./test-resources -prune -o -type f -print | zip -r ../ui5-vizframe-app.zip -@ && cd ..
scripts.preview: npm run deploy:zip && npx --yes http-server dist -p 8080 -o -c-1
